source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local support surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and first anchored at seg.1.1.1.3 (1,1,1,3)
distilled_thesis: The triad of Zarathustra, eagle, and serpent is the collective subject that waits, receives, and blesses together at the cave.
